title: KnightHomes
description: A simple and modern home system plugin for survival servers. Set, manage and teleport to multiple homes using an intuitive GUI and sounds.
body:
**KnightHomes** is a lightweight and fast homes plugin for Minecraft servers.
It lets players easily teleport to their saved home through a sleek, clickable GUI — with customizable icons and colors without server restart.
Built for simplicity, performance and compatibility with Bukkit, Spigot and Paper.

## ✅ Features

- 🏠 Teleport to your personal home with one command
- 🗺️ **Interactive GUI** for selecting your home
- 🎨 Fully **customizable icons and colors** in the GUI
- ⏳ Optional **confirmation before deleting a home**
- 🔒 Permission-based limits for home access
- ⚡**Lag-free** performance, even on large servers



## 📜 Commands

- **/home** – Open your home GUI and teleport
- **/home reload** – Reload the plugin configuration



## **💬 Need Help or Want to Suggest Features?**

Join our **[Discord](https://discord.com/invite/PWNzT5ABA6)** community for: 

- 📢 Updates & announcements
- 💡 Feature suggestions
- 🐛 Bug reports & support
- 👥 Chat with other server owners


## ⚙️ Config
Available on github: [KnightHomes Documentation](https://github.com/virendraxd/KnightHomes)
